analysis.summary: Multiple vulnerabilities detected on hawkshippings.com. These include FTP sending credentials in plain text, HTTP being unencrypted, and potential security misconfigurations.

findings.vulnerability: FTP sends credentials in plain text. Vulnerable to sniffing.
findings.exploitation: An attacker can intercept and read sensitive information, such as usernames and passwords, sent over the network.
findings.remediation: Implement secure authentication methods, such as SSL/TLS encryption, to protect credentials.

findings.vulnerability: HTTP is unencrypted. Susceptible to Man-in-the-Middle (MitM) attacks.
findings.exploitation: An attacker can intercept and modify sensitive information, such as login credentials or financial data, sent over the network.
findings.remediation: Implement HTTPS encryption to protect data in transit.

findings.vulnerability: Cleartext Authentication is exposed. Passwords are sent in cleartext and can be easily intercepted (sniffed) on the network.
findings.exploitation: An attacker can intercept and read sensitive information, such as usernames and passwords, sent over the network.
findings.remediation: Implement secure authentication methods, such as SSL/TLS encryption, to protect credentials.
